name: FLUX.1 [dev] Control LoRA Depth
description: FLUX Control LoRA Depth is a high-performance endpoint that uses a control image using a depth map to transfer structure to the generated image and another initial image to guide color.
tagline: FLUX Control LoRA Depth is a high-performance endpoint that uses a control image using a depth map to transfer structure to the generated image and another initial image to guide color.
